They need connectivity. When quality falls below tolerance, they do not consume less — they leave. The loyalty window varies by segment: enterprise contracts extend it, consumer prepaid compresses it to days. Whoever can identify the high-ARPU subscriber in that window can intervene."}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-10","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-xl font-serif personalised intervention — proactive compensation, priority routing, or case management — before the subscriber is aware a problem occurred."}]}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-10","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-xl font-serif text-[var(--foreground)] mb-4","children":"Derived
